ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Aug-27-2024 Continued To Oct-29-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Jeanette Fisher-Kouadio for Natalie Berry (executor).

Mrs. Fisher-Kouadio presented a copy of a declaration regarding the trust heirs that was filed on August 26th, stated that the executor is not the trustee and that the trustee is Robert C. Henry. Mrs. Fisher-Kouadio also stated that all three of the heirs at law are also heirs of the trust, and that she hoped to have a petition for final distribution last month, but there are four deceased heirs and they had to open probate in three different counties. Status on close of estate is continued to October 29, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The court informed Mrs. Fisher-Kouadio that if she is not ready to file a petition for final distribution, she will need to file a petition for approval of report on status of administration.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Nguyen. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jul-25-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Jeanette Fisher-Kouadio appearing in person for Natalie Berry (petitioner).

There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of lost Will and for Letters Testamentary. The lost will dated January 9, 2001 is admitted to probate. Natalie Berry is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority.Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for August 27, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If either a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status on administration is filed two weeks prior to the hearing date, the status hearing will go off calendar. Frank Mahoney III is appointed Probate Referee.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Wan. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
